title: SQLancer TLP query with wrong results 3
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE, status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value, status) VALUES (1, 0.5, TRUE);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, value, status) VALUES (2, NULL, FALSE);
SELECT t1.id FROM t1 WHERE (0.5 IN (value, NULL)) IS NULL;
SELECT t1.id FROM t1 WHERE (0.5 IN (SELECT value FROM t1 WHERE status = TRUE)) IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of IN clause with NULL results
